title: ExceptionPayload
description: Represents an exception within an error event, including the error class, message, and stack trace frames.

errorClass.description: The class or type name of the exception (e.g., TypeError, NullPointerException, RuntimeError).

message.description: The human-readable error message describing what went wrong.

stacktrace.description: The stack trace frames for this exception, ordered from the frame where the error occurred to the entry point.
